name: recall-inbox
description: A personal inbox for saved items from X bookmarks, GitHub stars, and more.

scripts.cf:deploy-demo: tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build && node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs deploy --config wrangler.demo.toml
scripts.cf:release: tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build && node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs d1 migrations apply DB --remote && node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs deploy
